**Output Format**
```plaintext

<tool_call>
{"name": "Tool name", "parameters": {"Parameter name": "Parameter content", "... ...": "... ..."}}
{"name": "... ...", "parameters": {"... ...": "... ...", "... ...": "... ..."}}
...

{"name": "... ...", "parameters": {"... ...": "... ...", "... ...": "... ..."}}
...
explanation: This feature represents structured prompt templates or formatting instructions for AI systems, particularly those involving a thinking section and tool/function calling with JSON parameter specifications.
harmful_reason: These are technical formatting instructions for AI systems to structure their responses and tool usage, with no inherently harmful content present.
